scripts.build:js: concat -o assets/js/dist/xalise.bundle.js assets/js/core/XalConstants.js assets/js/core/BsBreakpoints.js assets/js/loaders/XalLoaderNav.js assets/js/loaders/XalLoaderPlaceholder.js assets/js/loaders/XalLoaderToast.js assets/js/loaders/XalLoaderOverlay.js assets/js/components/XalToast.js assets/js/core/XalHttp.js assets/js/components/XalTooltips.js assets/js/components/XalSidebar.js assets/js/components/XalNotifications.js assets/js/components/XalDialog.js assets/js/xalise.js
scripts.watch:js: npm run build:js && chokidar "assets/js/**/*.js" --ignore "assets/js/dist/**" -c "npm run build:js"
